---
title: "MOTIVATE mapping - Creating maps to see Mahalanobis distance"
author: "Alicia Valdés"
date: "`r format(Sys.time(), '%d %B, %Y')`"
output:
  pdf_document:
    toc: yes
    toc_depth: 4
  html_document:
    toc: yes
    toc_depth: '4'
    df_print: paged
  word_document:
    toc: yes
    toc_depth: '4'
editor_options:
  chunk_output_type: inline
---

This notebook creates one map for each PlotObservationID to see how well the Mahalanobis distance is working for mapping.

# Load libraries

```{r}
library(sf)
library(terra)
library(tmap)
library(stringr)
library(readr)
library(here)
library(tidyverse)
```

# Load data

```{r}
# Load points from ReSurvey Europe observations from validated plots.
# Some (most) of these observations are validated, but some are not.
# The attribute 'valid_Landsat' indicates if the observation is validated
# (TRUE), not validated (FALSE) or could not be validated (NA).
points <- read_csv(here("..", "MOTIVATE_validation", "data", "clean", "data_obs_in_val_plots_20260416.csv")) %>%
  st_as_sf(coords = c("Lon_updated", "Lat_updated"), crs = 4326)
# Create a 500-m buffer around each point
buffers <- points %>%
  st_transform(crs = 32630) %>% # Transform to UTM zone 30N
  st_buffer(dist = 500) %>% # Create a 500-m buffer
  st_transform(crs = 4326) # Transform back to WGS84

raster_files <- list.files(
  here("..", "..", "..", "Data", "MOTIVATE", "MOTIVATE_RS_data", "mapping", "mahalanobis_260507_max_1pixel"), 
  pattern = "\\.tif$", full.names = TRUE, recursive = TRUE) 

raster_files_3x3 <- list.files(
  here("..", "..", "..", "Data", "MOTIVATE", "MOTIVATE_RS_data", "mapping", "mahalanobis_260507_max_3x3pixels"), 
  pattern = "\\.tif$", full.names = TRUE, recursive = TRUE)

raster_files_seasonal <- list.files(
  here("..", "..", "..", "Data", "MOTIVATE", "MOTIVATE_RS_data", "mapping", "mahalanobis_260508_max_1pixel_seasonal"), 
  pattern = "\\.tif$", full.names = TRUE, recursive = TRUE)

raster_files_3x3_seasonal <- list.files(
  here("..", "..", "..", "Data", "MOTIVATE", "MOTIVATE_RS_data", "mapping", "mahalanobis_260508_max_3x3pixels_seasonal"), 
  pattern = "\\.tif$", full.names = TRUE, recursive = TRUE)
```

# Extract PlotObservationID from raster filenames

```{r}
get_id <- function(x) {
  id <- str_extract(x, "(?<=Obs)\\d+")
  as.numeric(id)
}

raster_ids <- data.frame(
  file = raster_files,
  PlotObservationID = sapply(raster_files, get_id)
)
raster_ids_3x3 <- data.frame(
  file = raster_files_3x3,
  PlotObservationID = sapply(raster_files_3x3, get_id)
)
raster_ids_seasonal <- data.frame(
  file = raster_files_seasonal,
  PlotObservationID = sapply(raster_files_seasonal, get_id)
)
raster_ids_3x3_seasonal <- data.frame(
  file = raster_files_3x3_seasonal,
  PlotObservationID = sapply(raster_files_3x3_seasonal, get_id)
)
sum(is.na(raster_ids$PlotObservationID))
sum(is.na(raster_ids_3x3$PlotObservationID))
sum(is.na(raster_ids_seasonal$PlotObservationID))
sum(is.na(raster_ids_3x3_seasonal$PlotObservationID))
```

# Prepare tmap mode

```{r}
tmap_mode("plot")  # for exporting
```

# Loop over IDs and create maps

```{r message=FALSE}
output_dir <- "maps_combined_MAX_seasonal/"
dir.create(output_dir, showWarnings = FALSE)

ids <- points %>% 
  distinct(PlotObservationID) %>%
  filter(PlotObservationID %in% raster_ids$PlotObservationID) %>%
  pull(PlotObservationID)

for (id in ids) {
  
  # subset vector layers
  pt  <- points[points$PlotObservationID == id, ]
  buf <- buffers[buffers$PlotObservationID == id, ]
  
  # ---- EXTRACT INFO EARLY ----
  info <- pt[1, ]
  
  # ---- DEFINE OUTPUT FILE EARLY ----
  outfile <- file.path(
    output_dir,
    paste0(
      "plot", info$plotID_AV_num,
      "_year", info$year,
      "_obs", info$PlotObservationID,
      ".png"
    )
  )
  
  # ✅ SKIP EARLY (BEFORE HEAVY WORK)
  if (file.exists(outfile)) {
    message("Skipping existing map: ", outfile)
    next
  }
  
  # ---- GET RASTERS (ONLY IF NEEDED) ----
  rfile <- raster_ids$file[raster_ids$PlotObservationID == id][1]
  if (is.na(rfile) || !file.exists(rfile)) {
    message("Skipping (missing raster): ", id)
    next
  }
  
  rfile_3x3 <- raster_ids_3x3$file[raster_ids_3x3$PlotObservationID == id][1]
  if (is.na(rfile_3x3) || !file.exists(rfile_3x3)) {
    message("Skipping (missing raster 3x3): ", id)
    next
  }
  
  rfile_seasonal <- raster_ids_seasonal$file[raster_ids_seasonal$PlotObservationID == id][1]
  if (is.na(rfile_seasonal) || !file.exists(rfile_seasonal)) {
    message("Skipping (missing raster seasonal): ", id)
    next
  }
  
  rfile_3x3_seasonal <- raster_ids_3x3_seasonal$file[raster_ids_3x3_seasonal$PlotObservationID == id][1]
  if (is.na(rfile_3x3_seasonal) || !file.exists(rfile_3x3_seasonal)) {
    message("Skipping (missing raster 3x3 seasonal): ", id)
    next
  }
  
  r <- rast(rfile)
  r_3x3 <- rast(rfile_3x3)
  r_seasonal <- rast(rfile_seasonal)
  r_3x3_seasonal <- rast(rfile_3x3_seasonal)
  
  # ---- FORCE COMMON CRS ----
  buf <- st_transform(buf, 3857)
  pt  <- st_transform(pt, 3857)
  r <- project(r, "EPSG:3857", method = "bilinear")
  r_3x3  <- project(r_3x3, "EPSG:3857", method = "bilinear")
  r_seasonal <- project(r_seasonal, "EPSG:3857", method = "bilinear")
  r_3x3_seasonal <- project(r_3x3_seasonal, "EPSG:3857", method = "bilinear")
  
  # mask instead of crop
  r <- mask(r, vect(buf))
  r_3x3 <- mask(r_3x3, vect(buf))
  r_seasonal <- mask(r_seasonal, vect(buf))
  r_3x3_seasonal <- mask(r_3x3_seasonal, vect(buf))
  
  # ---- DEFINE FIXED EXTENT ----
  bb <- st_bbox(buf)
  
  # ---- TITLE ----
  title_noraster <- paste(
    paste("Plot:", info$plotID_AV_num),
    paste("Year:", info$year),
    paste("Obs:", info$PlotObservationID),
    paste("EUNIS:", info$EUNIS1),
    paste("valid:", info$valid_Landsat),
    sep = " | "
  )
  
  title_raster <- "Mahalanobis with one pixel"
  
  title_raster_3x3 <- "Mahalanobis with 3x3 pixels"
  
  title_raster_seasonal <- "Mahalanobis with one pixel (seasonal)"
  
  title_raster_3x3_seasonal <- "Mahalanobis with 3x3 pixels (seasonal)"
  
    # ---- MAP 1: without raster ----
  map_noraster <- tm_shape(buf, bbox = bb) +
    tm_tiles("Esri.WorldImagery") +
    tm_borders(col = "red", lwd = 2) +
    tm_shape(pt) +
    tm_symbols(col = "white", fill = "white", size = 0.5) +
    tm_title(title_noraster, size = 0.9)
  
  # ---- MAP 2: with raster ----
  map_raster <- tm_shape(buf, bbox = bb) +
    tm_tiles("Esri.WorldImagery") +
    tm_shape(r) +
    tm_raster(style = "fixed",
              breaks = c(0, 0.1, 0.3, 0.5, 0.7, 1),
              palette = "-viridis", col_alpha = 0.7) +
    tm_shape(pt) +
    tm_symbols(col = "white", fill = "white", size = 0.5) +
    tm_title(title_raster, size = 0.9) +
  tm_layout(legend.show = FALSE)

  # ---- MAP 3: with raster 3x3 ----
  map_raster_3x3 <- tm_shape(buf, bbox = bb) +
    tm_tiles("Esri.WorldImagery") +
    tm_shape(r_3x3) +
    tm_raster(style = "fixed",
              breaks = c(0, 0.1, 0.3, 0.5, 0.7, 1),
              palette = "-viridis", col_alpha = 0.7) +
    tm_shape(pt) +
    tm_symbols(col = "white", fill = "white", size = 0.5) +
    tm_title(title_raster_3x3, size = 0.9) +
    tm_layout(legend.show = FALSE)
  
  # ---- MAP 4: with raster seasonal ----
  map_raster_seasonal <- tm_shape(buf, bbox = bb) +
    tm_tiles("Esri.WorldImagery") +
    tm_shape(r_seasonal) +
    tm_raster(style = "fixed",
              breaks = c(0, 0.1, 0.3, 0.5, 0.7, 1),
              palette = "-viridis", col_alpha = 0.7) +
    tm_shape(pt) +
    tm_symbols(col = "white", fill = "white", size = 0.5) +
    tm_title(title_raster_seasonal, size = 0.9) +
    tm_layout(legend.show = FALSE)
  
  # ---- MAP 5: with raster 3x3 seasonal ----
  map_raster_3x3_seasonal <- tm_shape(buf, bbox = bb) +
    tm_tiles("Esri.WorldImagery") +
    tm_shape(r_3x3_seasonal) +
    tm_raster(style = "fixed",
              breaks = c(0, 0.1, 0.3, 0.5, 0.7, 1),
              palette = "-viridis", col_alpha = 0.7) +
    tm_shape(pt) +
    tm_symbols(col = "white", fill = "white", size = 0.5) +
    tm_title(title_raster_3x3_seasonal, size = 0.9) +
    tm_layout(legend.show = FALSE)
  
  # Create dummy raster for legend
  small_ext <- ext(r)
  small_ext[2] <- small_ext[1] + 1   # shrink width to 1 unit
  small_ext[4] <- small_ext[3] + 1   # shrink height to 1 unit
  
  legend_raster <- crop(r, small_ext)

    # Build legend-only map
  legend_map <- tm_shape(legend_raster) +
    tm_raster(
      style = "fixed",
      breaks = c(0, 0.1, 0.3, 0.5, 0.7, 1),
      palette = "-viridis"
      ) +
    tm_layout(
      legend.show = TRUE,
      legend.position = c("right", "center"),
      legend.just = c("right", "center"),
      frame = FALSE
      )
  
  # ---- COMBINE ----
  final_map <- tmap_arrange(map_noraster, map_raster, map_raster_3x3, 
                            legend_map, map_raster_seasonal, 
                            map_raster_3x3_seasonal,
                            ncol = 3, nrow = 2)
  
  # ---- EXPORT ----
  tmap_save(final_map, outfile, width = 12, height = 8, units = "in", dpi = 300)
}
```

# Session info

```{r}
sessionInfo()
```
